summary: AI/ML Engineer and BTech Computer Science student specializing in Artificial Intelligence with a strong academic 8.05 GPA from Parul University. Builds Generative AI applications and multi-agent architectures using LangChain and RAG to automate complex business workflows for production environments. Successfully deployed agentic systems reducing manual triage by 100% and automated high-fidelity resume platforms reaching 95% ATS matching precision.

bullet_points: Audited six months of historical sales records to identify 18% discrepancy rates caused by inconsistent manual data entry across legacy spreadsheet systems.
Interviewed five key personnel to map lifecycle stages, identifying three major bottlenecks in manual inventory tracking for structured workflow automation system design.
Transformed manual billing requirements into a structured technical roadmap for BI platforms, ensuring the system addressed 100% of identified core operational gaps.
Executed statistical audits across 15 major crop variants like Sugarcane, identifying localized production strengths using Python-based data science modeling methods.
Devised a multi-stage data validation framework for unit standardization, reducing total dataset preprocessing time by 60% through custom Python script workflow automation.
Authored 10 pages of technical documentation detailing the architectural design and statistical methodologies used for large-scale agricultural Machine Learning analysis.

projects.name: Email Automator & AI Sales Agent
bullet_points: Constructed a stateful agentic pipeline using LangGraph nodes for intent parsing and RAG-based knowledge retrieval, eliminating 100% of manual email triage effort.
Orchestrated a serverless CI/CD automation workflow via GitHub Actions with 15-minute cron triggers, enabling zero-infrastructure continuous operation for two live production domains.
Scaled the system to handle dual-site inquiry volumes by engineering modular LangGraph pipelines, reducing average lead response time from hours to 15 minutes.

projects.name: TailoredResume.ai
bullet_points: Developed an agentic AI pipeline using FastAPI and Gemini to automate targeted resume tailoring, achieving a 95% ATS match score for users.
Engineered a high-fidelity PDF generation engine using ReportLab, ensuring 90% keyword coverage for must-have skills while enforcing strict industry-standard formatting constraints.
Integrated a fallback multi-model architecture with Gemini Pro and Flash to ensure 99.9% system availability and processing reliability during peak traffic periods.

projects.name: OrderEazy Analytics
bullet_points: Improved business intelligence reporting by integrating a Gemini Pro module that synthesizes complex metrics, cutting executive reporting time by 70% in production.
Increased monthly revenue by 35% through implementation of RFM segmentation and time-series forecasting models using custom Python-based regression and data science engines.
Migrated legacy spreadsheets to a unified Supabase PostgreSQL architecture, reducing critical business data retrieval and report generation time from minutes to milliseconds.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science Engineering - Artificial Intelligence

certifications: Generative AI for Business - IIM Mumbai (2025)
Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Certified AI Foundations Associate - Oracle (2025)
